framework: UN SDG 6 — Clean water and sanitation
requirement: Substantially increase water-use efficiency across all sectors
gaia_output: Water intensity per functional unit (L/request, L/1M tokens) from the two-path model; trend across periods in the Usage Log

framework: UN SDG 7 — Affordable and clean energy
requirement: Double the global rate of improvement in energy efficiency
gaia_output: The A–E grade is an energy-intensity rating per task class; Module A' intensity-reduction targets track 7.3 directly

framework: UN SDG 7 — Affordable and clean energy
requirement: Increase the share of renewable energy
gaia_output: Market-based CI input and the low-carbon-region lever document the renewable share of AI electricity

framework: UN SDG 8 — Decent work and economic growth
requirement: Improve resource efficiency; decouple growth from environmental degradation
gaia_output: Rates-before-totals (P4): footprint per task outcome (R4) is a decoupling metric — AI output vs. resources consumed

framework: UN SDG 9 — Industry innovation and infrastructure
requirement: Upgrade infrastructure for sustainability and resource-use efficiency
gaia_output: Mitigation levers 1, 2, 8 (right-sizing, reasoning budgets, newer accelerators) with measured effect sizes

framework: UN SDG 12 — Responsible consumption and production
requirement: Sustainable management and efficient use of natural resources
gaia_output: The full Ground→Assess inventory: an auditable account of energy and water consumed by AI use
